## Test Coverage

## Checklist

- [ ] `cargo test` — all tests pass
- [ ] `./tests/e2e_indexfiles.sh` — end-to-end tests pass
- [ ] `cargo clippy -- -D warnings` — no lint warnings
- [ ] `cargo fmt` — code is formatted
